raw_response:
As the owner of Bar Leon, I need information that helps me compete for staff *right now* on Wyspa Spichrzów. While both reports correctly identify the market's core mechanics—the minimum wage floor and the critical "under-26" tax strategy—Variant B is significantly more useful. Its "Direct Competitor Intelligence" section is the killer feature, providing specific salary data from my immediate rivals like SASSY, Chleb i Wino, and Whiskey in the Jar. Knowing that SASSY is offering 7,250–11,000 PLN for a bar manager is a concrete, actionable fact I can use to structure my own offers this week. Variant A provides a brilliant analysis of the market *dynamics*, but Variant B gives me the specific numbers my competitors are using to poach talent. The greater specificity, broader source base, and direct competitive benchmarking in B make it the clear winner for an operator who needs to make decisions, not just understand theories.

```json
{"winner": "B", "supporting_urls": ["https://www.olx.pl/praca/gdansk/", "https://ogloszenia.trojmiasto.pl/praca-zatrudnie/"]}
```
